packet_markdown:
# Avalon West Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: avalon-west-hollywood-7316-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 7316 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/
- Management company: AvalonBay Communities
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: low

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official Avalon site still markets a broad unit mix and a professionally operated community in a prime West Hollywood location. Source: AvalonBay official site (https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/). Note: Official materials describe studios through townhomes and Signature Collection homes in West Hollywood.
- [review] Apartments.com currently lists washer/dryer in unit, on-site retail, pool, and fitness center. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/avalon-west-hollywood-west-hollywood-ca/wv7mqpk/). Note: Current listing shows in-unit washer/dryer, on-site retail, pool, and fitness center.
- [review] Birdeye still shows a large body of public resident reviews for the property. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/avalon-west-hollywood-156632295346353). Note: Birdeye showed 248 customer reviews in the current public profile.

## Open questions
- Confirm access control and package handling details, plus full recurring fee stack.

## Notes
Tour candidate. The location fit is excellent, the operator is established, and the fee stack appears more transparent than many peers, with the main remaining questions centered on access control and package handling.
